title: Newest Collection - Hustle & Heart!
excerpt: So excited to share a peek at my newest collection with American Crafts, Hustle & Heart . It's hard to believe but this is the 13th one we have collaborated on. Hopefully that's a lucky number in this scenario. I…
body:
So excited to share a peek at my newest collection with American Crafts, Hustle & Heart. It's hard to believe but this is the 13th one we have collaborated on. Hopefully that's a lucky number in this scenario. I just got a first look at it, as the samples only arrived last week. Looking forward to playing with it and sharing projects with you soon. Also, I filmed a little first look/unboxing video of sorts that I am hoping to get up next week.

Hope you like what you see so far. Let me know in the comments what kind of project you'd like me to share using this collection!
